encounters.chief_complaint: Decreased urine output, edema, nausea, confusion

orders.display_name: urine_output_monitoring: Foley catheter, hourly urine output measurement
fluid_management: Individualized — NS if prerenal, restrict if oliguric/overloaded
hold_nephrotoxins: Hold NSAIDs, aminoglycosides, ACE-I/ARB, metformin
DVT_prophylaxis: Enoxaparin 2000IU SC daily (adjust for renal function)

medication_administrations.drug_name: DVT_prophylaxis: Enoxaparin 2000IU SC daily (adjust for renal function)
